calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Ashley Wistrom, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff Cach LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Larry N. Almonte.
Declaration of Yesenia Cardenas pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Court ordered defendants Does 1-10 Dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Cach LLC. and against Defendant Larry Almonte as follows:
Principal $2,020.62
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $485.00
Costs $345.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $2,850.62
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Set For Trial On Oct-07-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
